full_name: Spheroidal graphite (ductile/nodular) cast iron EN-GJS-400-15, number EN-JS1030
scope: Ferritic to ferritic-pearlitic spheroidal (nodular) graphite cast iron grade classified by mechanical properties on machined test pieces. Combines good elongation and toughness with useful strength; used for structural and pressure-bearing components, housings and safety parts. Equivalent to former GGG40 / ASTM A536 60-40-18.

chemical_composition.note: EN 1563 defines grades by mechanical properties/microstructure, not fixed composition. Typical foundry ranges below.

license_note: EN-GJS-400-15 grade designation and its property requirements (Rm/Rp0.2/A) are widely reproduced in free foundry datasheets and reference sites; composition is typical foundry practice, not reproduced EN text.
